mapper.select: SELECT sales_order_code, product_name, buyer_enterprise_name, seller_enterprise_name, order_quantity, unit_price, total_amount, order_date, order_status FROM t_sales_order WHERE prod_batch_no = #{prodBatchNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_date DESC

SELECT sales_order_code, product_name, buyer_enterprise_name, seller_enterprise_name, order_quantity, unit_price, total_amount, order_date, order_status FROM t_sales_order WHERE (product_name = #{productName} OR prod_batch_no = #{prodBatchNo}) AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_date DESC
